hero.subtitle: A fully functional calculator that secretly protects your private photos, videos, documents, and passwords. No one will ever know.

features.sectionSubtitle: Every feature designed with one goal: keeping your private life private.

calculator.title: Calculator Disguise
calculator.desc: Looks and works like a real calculator. Enter your secret PIN to unlock your vault. Nobody suspects a thing.

photos.title: Secure Photo & Video Vault
photos.desc: Import photos and videos from your gallery. They disappear from your camera roll and stay locked in your vault.

dashboard.title: All Files Protected
dashboard.desc: Store photos, videos, documents, audio files, and passwords — all encrypted and secured on your device.

customize.title: Total Customization
customize.desc: Personalize your calculator disguise with different themes and colors to blend in perfectly.

security.sectionSubtitle: Built for privacy from the ground up. Your data never leaves your device.

items.title: AES-256 Encryption
items.desc: Military-grade encryption protects every file in your vault.

items.title: No Cloud — On-Device Only
items.desc: Your data stays on your device. No servers, no cloud, no leaks.

items.title: Break-In Alerts
items.desc: Get notified with a photo if someone tries to access your vault.

items.title: Decoy Mode
items.desc: Show a fake empty vault if you're ever forced to open it.

items.title: 100% Free
items.desc: All core privacy features are completely free, forever.

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Join millions of people who protect their privacy with Photo Vault every day.

items.name: Alex M.
items.text: Finally an app that actually hides my private photos. The calculator disguise is genius — my partner uses my phone all the time and has no idea. Absolutely love it.

items.name: Jessica T.
items.text: I was skeptical at first, but this app is amazing. My private photos are safe and the calculator looks completely real. The break-in alerts are a great bonus.

items.name: David K.
items.text: The best privacy app I've ever used. It actually works as a calculator so nobody gets suspicious. I use it for photos, documents, and even passwords. 10/10.

cta.title: Protect Your Privacy Today
cta.subtitle: Download Photo Vault and hide your private photos, videos, and files behind a fully working calculator. Free forever.

articleCta.title: Protect Your Privacy with Photo Vault
articleCta.subtitle: Hide your private photos and files behind a working calculator. Free for iOS and Android.
